file.content:
#!/bin/bash

DOTFILES_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "$0")" && pwd)"

FILES="bashrc vimrc screenrc tmux.conf gitconfig psqlrc bash_profile"

BACKUP_DIR="$HOME/.dotfiles-backup"
TIMESTAMP=$(date '+%Y%m%d-%H%M%S')

for FILE in $FILES; do
    if [ -f "${FILE}" ]; then
        if [ -e "$HOME/.$FILE" ] && [ ! -L "$HOME/.$FILE" ]; then
            mkdir -p "$BACKUP_DIR"
            mv "$HOME/.$FILE" "$BACKUP_DIR/$FILE.$TIMESTAMP"
        fi
        ln -sf "$DOTFILES_DIR/$FILE" "$HOME/.$FILE"
    fi
done


# Clean up legacy .bash_login (superseded by .bash_profile)
if [ -L "$HOME/.bash_login" ]; then
    rm -f "$HOME/.bash_login"
fi

LOCAL=`echo "bashrc.$HOSTNAME" | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]'`
if [ -f "$LOCAL" ]; then
    ln -s "$DOTFILES_DIR/$LOCAL" "$HOME/.bashrc.local" 2> /dev/null || true
elif [ "$CODESPACES" = "true" ] && [ -f "bashrc.codespaces" ]; then
    ln -s "$DOTFILES_DIR/bashrc.codespaces" "$HOME/.bashrc.local" 2> /dev/null || true
fi

# VS Code — symlink settings into ~/.config/Code/User/
if [ -f "vscode/settings.json" ]; then
    mkdir -p "$HOME/.config/Code/User"
    ln -s "$DOTFILES_DIR/vscode/settings.json" "$HOME/.config/Code/User/settings.json" 2> /dev/null || true
fi

# Claude Code — symlink portable files into ~/.claude/
CLAUDE_FILES="settings.json statusline.sh CLAUDE.md"
if [ -d "claude" ]; then
    mkdir -p "$HOME/.claude"
    for FILE in $CLAUDE_FILES; do
        if [ -f "claude/$FILE" ]; then
            ln -s "$DOTFILES_DIR/claude/$FILE" "$HOME/.claude/$FILE" 2> /dev/null || true
        fi
    done
    # Symlink skills directory
    if [ -d "claude/skills" ]; then
        ln -s "$DOTFILES_DIR/claude/skills" "$HOME/.claude/skills" 2> /dev/null || true
    fi
fi

toolUseResult.originalFile:
#!/bin/bash

DOTFILES_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "$0")" && pwd)"

FILES="bashrc vimrc screenrc tmux.conf gitconfig psqlrc bash_profile"

BACKUP_DIR="$HOME/.dotfiles-backup"
TIMESTAMP=$(date '+%Y%m%d-%H%M%S')

for FILE in $FILES; do
    if [ -f "${FILE}" ]; then
        if [ -e "$HOME/.$FILE" ] && [ ! -L "$HOME/.$FILE" ]; then
            mkdir -p "$BACKUP_DIR"
            mv "$HOME/.$FILE" "$BACKUP_DIR/$FILE.$TIMESTAMP"
        fi
        ln -sf "$DOTFILES_DIR/$FILE" "$HOME/.$FILE"
    fi
done


# Clean up legacy .bash_login (superseded by .bash_profile)
if [ -L "$HOME/.bash_login" ]; then
    rm -f "$HOME/.bash_login"
fi

LOCAL=`echo "bashrc.$HOSTNAME" | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]'`
if [ -f "$LOCAL" ]; then
    ln -s "$DOTFILES_DIR/$LOCAL" "$HOME/.bashrc.local" 2> /dev/null || true
elif [ "$CODESPACES" = "true" ] && [ -f "bashrc.codespaces" ]; then
    ln -s "$DOTFILES_DIR/bashrc.codespaces" "$HOME/.bashrc.local" 2> /dev/null || true
fi

# VS Code — symlink settings into ~/.config/Code/User/
if [ -f "vscode/settings.json" ]; then
    mkdir -p "$HOME/.config/Code/User"
    ln -s "$DOTFILES_DIR/vscode/settings.json" "$HOME/.config/Code/User/settings.json" 2> /dev/null || true
fi

# Claude Code — symlink portable files into ~/.claude/
CLAUDE_FILES="settings.json statusline.sh CLAUDE.md"
if [ -d "claude" ]; then
    mkdir -p "$HOME/.claude"
    for FILE in $CLAUDE_FILES; do
        if [ -f "claude/$FILE" ]; then
            ln -s "$DOTFILES_DIR/claude/$FILE" "$HOME/.claude/$FILE" 2> /dev/null || true
        fi
    done
    # Symlink skills directory
    if [ -d "claude/skills" ]; then
        ln -s "$DOTFILES_DIR/claude/skills" "$HOME/.claude/skills" 2> /dev/null || true
    fi
fi

content.text: The `claude/settings.json` diff is just key reordering with no functional change. I'll commit only `install.sh` to keep this focused. The branch is already 2 commits ahead, so push will include those too.

symlink ensure-dolt.sh into ~/.claude/ during install

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"
